name: Wicker Round Patio Table Blue/White - Roller Rabbit x Target
description:
This Wicker Round Patio Table from Roller Rabbit x Target is a practical and stylish addition to your patio space. Crafted with a steel frame and all-weather woven wicker, this patio table has a round tabletop. Plus, it's rust- and weather-resistant construction for year-round use.

Beloved for their colorful prints and uplifting styles, Roller Rabbit adds more joy to any journey. Now, they’re joining Target to celebrate travel, friendship and togetherness in this limited-edition collection designed to inspire your ultimate spring adventure.
